title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at IKEA India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
